name: Issue or Request
about: Use Buttons or Describe
title: "[TODO] - [Mod Name] | {Add smol title}"

<!-- Basically: replace [Mod Name] with the name of the mod, and check anything applicable. Optionally fill out 'Elaboration' with a full idea/issue or just hit submit. You can either put an `x` in the box instead of the space, or just submit as is and click them to active afterwards. -->
<!-- You don't have to use the buttons, it just helps if you have other things to be doing -->
# Quick Buttons:
- [ ] - The mod is broken by updates/doesn't work ATM. Please update it to the latest version.
- [ ] - I have logs to assist with this issue. [Please Attach]
- [ ] - I am having a non-version related crash. Please fix it.
- [ ] - I have attached a mod-list related to this issue.
- [ ] - I have an Idea I would like in this mod as I think it would fit.
- [ ] - Something in this mod is broken. [Please Elaborate]

# Elaboration
